pilot_overview.purpose: Validate the full experimental pipeline on a reduced scale before committing GPU time to the complete study. Pilots use SynthSAEBench-1k (1,024 features, 32 root trees) with 1 replicate per variant.
pilot_overview.dataset: SynthSAEBench-1k: 1024 features, 256 hidden dim, 32 root trees, branching factor 4, depth 3

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Baseline ReLU SAE
pilot_tasks.description: Train Standard ReLU + L1 SAE on SynthSAEBench-1k. Validates baseline absorption rate and pipeline correctness.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption rate between 0.15-0.30 (consistent with prior pilot 0.203); MSE < 0.02; L0 > 500

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: TopK SAE k=50
pilot_tasks.description: Train TopK SAE with k=50 on SynthSAEBench-1k. Validates TopK dominance hypothesis (H1).
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption rate < 0.10 (prior pilot: 0.033); L0 ~ 50; large reduction vs baseline

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: MultiScale SAE
pilot_tasks.description: Train Matryoshka BatchTopK SAE on SynthSAEBench-1k. Validates multi-scale decomposition effect.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Orthogonality SAE
pilot_tasks.description: Train SAE with decoder orthogonality penalty on SynthSAEBench-1k. Validates orthogonality null hypothesis (H3).
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption rate comparable to baseline (Cohen's d < 0.5); prior pilot showed 2.7% reduction (d=0.14)

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Gated SAE
pilot_tasks.description: Train Gated SAE on SynthSAEBench-1k. Exploratory pilot for gating mechanism effect.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Pipeline runs successfully; absorption rate and L0 measured

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Random Control
pilot_tasks.description: Evaluate untrained SAE with random decoder. Validates metric discrimination.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption rate > 0.5 (prior pilot: 0.56); confirms metric discriminates structure from randomness

go_conditions: TopK shows absorption reduction > 50% vs baseline (H1 supported)
no_go_conditions: TopK absorption is comparable to baseline (d < 1.0)
revision_conditions: Baseline absorption at floor (< 0.15) or ceiling (> 0.50) -- adjust L1 coefficient
Orthogonality shows large effect (d > 1.0) -- contradicts prior pilot, investigate
MultiScale effect much larger than TopK -- revise hypothesis ranking

pilot_to_full_scaling.estimated_time_scaling: Pilot ~30 min total -> Full ~2.5 hours total
